name: 04_mc_absent_no_disarm
description: When MC is absent and the stop is armed (fail-open), the disarm branch must NOT fire. The disarm condition requires mc_available=True AND prob_beating > TRIGGER_THRESHOLD_PCT * 2 AND current_return > 0. With mc_available=False (MC absent), disarm must be skipped.

expected.derivation: armed=True, mc_available=False. Disarm condition: `if mc_available and prob > threshold * 2 and return > 0` -> mc_available=False short-circuits. Disarm must not fire. Position stays armed. Without this, a permanently absent MC would arm and immediately disarm on the same tick.
